Worm.title: Space worm
Worm.description: A grotesque-looking worm that requires no atmosphere to breath. Not very tough on its own, but can be a problem in groups.

WormHeavy.title: Squamidon
WormHeavy.description: A grotesque-looking worm which has armoured scales protecting parts of its body. Although from the same family as the space worm, these creatures have evolved to be much tougher.
